description: Formal dressing only gets better with these black leather shoes from provogue. The tapered toe box and cutting edge look complements all formal and semi-casual wear. The design creates a perfect foundation for building a well-groomed look that exudes style and confidence.UpperFull grain multi-layered leather upper for maximum durability and styleTapered toe for comfort and stylePerforations on the side of the forefoot areaSlip-on system for ease of wearStitch detailing to enhance shoe lifeMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and supportCushioned footbed for added comfortLeather inner for absorbing moisture and keeping feet dryOutsoleLightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorptionOutsole in multi patterned texture for great gripShoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
